name: po-adk-typescript
description: Prompt Opinion Agent Examples — Built with Google ADK · A2A Protocol · TypeScript

scripts.dev: concurrently -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,gray" -n "healthcare,general,orchestrator,care-transition,medication,scheduling,care-gap" "npx tsx healthcare_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx general_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx orchestrator/server.ts" "npx tsx care_transition_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx medication_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx scheduling_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx care_gap_agent/server.ts"
scripts.adk:web: npm run build && npx adk web dist
scripts.adk:run: npm run build && npx adk run dist
